revenue_recognition.policy: IP licenses grant right to access brand IP, reservation systems, and PMS. Primary performance obligation is a series of distinct services transferred over time. Variable consideration (franchise royalty fees) allocated to distinct services via prescribed variable consideration allocation guidance. Revenue recognized in period earned using time as measure of progress. Sales-based royalty fees recognized as hotel room sales occur.
revenue_recognition.franchise_royalty_fees: Based on % of hotel monthly gross room revenue (and sometimes F&B/other). Billed monthly, recognized as services provided. Contract acquisition cost amortization reduces royalty fees.
revenue_recognition.franchise_sales_coo_fees: Fixed fees for new hotels, COO, or extensions. Collected upfront, recognized over contract term.
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized in period payment received (no further service obligation, collection uncertainty).

franchise_contracts.policy: Consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners capitalized as contract acquisition costs. Together with incremental costs to obtain contracts, recorded as 'franchise contracts, net' on balance sheet. Amortized straight-line over estimated useful lives (contract term including sole-option extensions), generally 10–20 years. Amortization begins on hotel opening date or contract execution date, whichever is later.
franchise_contracts.acquisition_costs_amortization: Recognized as reduction to franchise royalty fees.
franchise_contracts.impairment_policy: Evaluated for indicators of impairment. If indicators exist, recoverability analysis compares expected undiscounted future cash flows to net carrying value. If not recoverable and exceeds fair value, impairment loss recognized pro rata across asset group.

accounts_receivable_and_financing_receiv.ar_policy: Amounts due from franchised hotel owners. Allowance for credit losses based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, and current/forecasted business conditions.
accounts_receivable_and_financing_receiv.financing_receivables: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners.

franchise_deposits.policy: Application/initiation fees collected at time of application. Recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues. If not approved, refunded less processing fees.

deferred_revenues.policy: Non-refundable advance consideration from hotel owners (reclassified from franchise deposits). Recognized over contract term.

fair_value_measurements.policy: Three-level valuation hierarchy (Level 1/2/3). Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023.

acquisitions.policy: Transactions assessed for business combination vs. asset acquisition. If fair value concentrated in single asset/group, treated as asset acquisition (cost allocated by relative fair values, no goodwill).

income_tax.policy: Disregarded entity for US income tax purposes. All taxable income/expense included in Hilton's computation. No US income tax provision recorded.
income_tax.foreign_tax: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments. Franchisee responsible for withholding/remittance. Foreign tax expense: $412K (2024), $128K (2023), $70K (2022).

graduate_acquisition.description: Acquisition of Graduate franchise contracts as part of larger Hilton acquisition of Graduate brand.
graduate_acquisition.amortization_method: Straight-line to depreciation and amortization expenses
graduate_acquisition.funding: Payment made by affiliate; short-term intercompany note payable recorded, settled February 2025 including accrued interest

related_party_transactions.centralized_cash_management: Hilton's centralized system, not controlled by the Company. Intercompany balances maintained.
related_party_transactions.franchise_deposits_lockbox: Collected by Hilton affiliates, deposited into lockbox to which Company has no access.
related_party_transactions.other_receivables_from_affiliates: $703,943K (2024) — settled through periodic settlements with simultaneous distributions of retained earnings to Parent.
related_party_transactions.due_from_affiliates_equity: $261,959K (2024) — amounts not expected to be repaid, reflected in member's equity.
related_party_transactions.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate for reasonable compensation fee. No compensation provided in 2024, 2023, or 2022.

commitments_and_contingencies.debt_guarantees: Certain Hilton debt obligations (maturing 2025–2033) unconditionally and irrevocably guaranteed by certain Hilton domestic subsidiaries including the Company. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral.
commitments_and_contingencies.guarantee_liability: None recorded due to parent-subsidiary relationship.
commitments_and_contingencies.litigation: Various claims/lawsuits in ordinary course. Ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect on financial position, results, or cash flows.

subsequent_events.note: The subsequent events note incorrectly references 'March 18, 2024' but context indicates March 18, 2025 (the audit opinion date).

lease_accounting: Not applicable — entity has no leases disclosed.

depreciation_amortization.method: Straight-line for franchise contracts (10–20 year useful lives)

advertising_fund_accounting: Not applicable — Monthly Program Fee revenue is recognized as franchise royalty fees. No separate advertising fund entity.
